options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <fileName> # Specifies the name of the file where the netlist is written

options.name: -abstract
options.description: write an empty Verilog module with port declarations for the specified module (default is the top module)

options.name: -applyMaskShift
options.description: Add a suffix to the cell name of a leaf instance based on the instance's color assignments. Note the netlist must be unique or -flat must specified for the option to take effect.

options.name: -cellInstanceColor
options.description: Use the instance-based color

options.name: -cellMasterColor
options.description: Use the cell master-based color from the Innovus color engine

options.name: -cellNameMapFile
options.description: Replace the cell name of the leaf instance with the name specified in the map file(s). If cell name is not defined in the map file, change the cell name bases on the tool's default naming rule.

options.name: -derivePGPortDir
options.description: Specifies whether to derive (vs. assume) directions of implicit PG ports in saving a physical netlist.

options.name: -excludeCellDef
options.description: Excludes the definition of the specified cells

options.name: -excludeCellInst
options.description: Excludes the instances of the specified cells from the netlist

options.name: -excludeIlm
options.description: Exclude ilm module

options.name: -excludeLeafCell
options.description: Excludes leaf cell definitions in the netlist

options.name: -excludeTopCellPGPort
options.description: Excludes the specified power and ground port(s) from the top cell's module port list

options.name: -exportTopPGNets
options.description: Use top-cell PG nets as ports for the top module in a physical netlist created with -phys or -includePowerGround option.

options.name: -flat
options.description: Writes a flattened Verilog netlist

options.name: -flattenBus
options.description: Writes a flattened-bus Verilog netlist

options.name: -followLogicalModuleOrder
options.description: Follow logical module order

options.name: -ignoreFixedMask
options.description: Ignore fixedMask of the cell

options.name: -ilm
options.description: Writes out a netlist with ILM guts

options.name: -includeBumpCell
options.description: Writes bump cell information to the netlist

options.name: -includePhysicalCell
options.description: Includes the physical instances of the specified cells

options.name: -includePhysicalInst
options.description: Includes physical instances, such as fillers

options.name: -includePowerGround
options.description: Includes PG terms in module port list

options.name: -includeThruSubstrateInsts
options.description: Writes thru-substrate connectivity

options.name: -includeVirtualPG
options.description: Includes virtual PG components

options.name: -keepAllBackslash
options.description: Keeps all backslash in names

options.name: -lineLength
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of characters per line for module port lists and instance port connections

options.name: -maskShiftSuffix
options.description: Add a user suffix to the cell name of a leaf instance. Note the option needs to be used with -applyMaskShift to take effect.

options.name: -module
options.description: Saves the netlist of the specified module

options.name: -omitFloatingPort
options.description: Omits unconnected instance ports from the saved netlist

options.name: -onlyLeafCell
options.description: Writes only leaf cell definitions in the netlist

options.name: -onlyMacro
options.description: Writes only macro or block cell definitions to the netlist

options.name: -onlyStdCell
options.description: Writes only standard cell instances in the netlist

options.name: -phys
options.description: Same as '-includePowerGround -includePhysicalInst'

options.name: -removePowerGround
options.description: Removes PG ports, PG nets, PG pin connections and replaces PG net connections on signal pins with 1'b1 or 1'b0

options.name: -replaceTieConnection
options.description: Replaces 1'b1 and 1'b0 constants with undriven nets in the output netlist

options.name: -replaceWorWandWithWire
options.description: Replace wor/wand with wire statement

options.name: -replace_inout_with_output_for_pg_ports
options.description: Change the direction of inout P/G ports to output except for the ones defined by IEEE1801/UPF. Their directions remain unchanged.

options.name: -shortenNames
options.description: Map net/instance names to shorter names to reduce file size (used with -flat)

options.name: -topCell
options.description: Saves the specified module along with its submodules

options.name: -topModuleFirst
options.description: Write out top module first

options.name: -useCdsThruForAssign
options.description: Replace assign statement with cds_thru, the output netlist won't be able to read back by Innovus. This is only for third party tool.

options.name: -useEEQCellMap
options.description: Define the master cell and the EEQ cells to be mapped to the master cell {{masterCell cell1 cell2} ...}

options.name: -useEEQCellWithLibertyInfo
options.description: use EEQ cell with timing library info as the master cell of a leaf instance.

options.name: -writeConstantForSignalConnection
options.description: write constant value for tie pin connection

options.name: -writeSupply0Supply1
options.description: Write supply0/supply1 for PG nets
